creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-06 21:22:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/gnomad2        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Gnomad2 is a GTK+ music manager and swiss army knife for the Creative Labs
  NOMAD and Zen range plus the Dell DJ devices using the Portable Digital
  Entertainment (PDE) protocol.
  
  WWW: http://gnomad2.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/106424
  Submitted by:   Petar Zhivkov Petrov (pesho.petrov at gmail.com)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.794     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/audio/gnomad2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/gnomad2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/audio/gnomad2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/audio/gnomad2/pkg-plist (new)
